title: pulmonaria × digenea
intro: Pulmonaria × digenea, also known as Lungwort, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Pulmonaria officinalis and Pulmonaria mollis. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and acting as an antioxidant. Pulmonaria × digenea can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat respiratory issues and other health conditions.
